abort.ezviz_cloud_account_missing: EZVIZ cloud account missing. Please reconfigure EZVIZ cloud account
abort.reconfigure_not_supported: Only EZVIZ camera (RTSP) entries can be reconfigured. Use reauthentication to update the cloud account.

error.mfa_required: 2FA enabled on account, please disable and retry

data_description.enc_key: Optional. The verification code printed on the device label, used to decrypt encrypted motion images. Leave empty if it matches the RTSP password.

confirm.description: Enter RTSP credentials for EZVIZ camera {serial} with IP {ip_address}
confirm.title: Discovered EZVIZ Camera

reauth_confirm.description: Enter credentials to reauthenticate to EZVIZ cloud account
reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]

data_description.enc_key: Optional. The verification code printed on the device label, used to decrypt encrypted motion images. Leave empty if it matches the RTSP password.

reconfigure.description: Update the RTSP credentials and verification code for EZVIZ camera {serial}
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EZVIZ Camera

data.ffmpeg_arguments: Arguments passed to FFmpeg for cameras

set_alarm_detection_sensibility.description: Changes the sensibility level of the motion detection.

level.description: Sensibility level. 1-6 for type 0 (normal camera), or 1-100 for type 3 (PIR sensor camera).
level.name: Level

type_value.description: Detection type. 0 for normal camera, or 3 for PIR sensor camera.
type_value.name: Type

set_alarm_detection_sensibility.name: Set detection sensibility

wake_device.description: Wakes a camera from sleep mode. Especially useful for battery cameras.
wake_device.name: Wake camera

debug_authenticated_request.description: Sends a relative EZVIZ cloud API request with the camera account's authenticated session. Intended for endpoint discovery.

body_format.description: How to send the request body.
body_format.name: Body format

channel.description: Channel value available as {channel} in the path, params, and data.
channel.name: Channel

data.description: Form or JSON body. String values may use {serial} and {channel}.
data.name: Data

headers.description: Additional request headers. String values may use {serial} and {channel}.
headers.name: Headers

log_response.description: Writes the redacted request result to the Home Assistant log.
log_response.name: Log response

params.description: Query string parameters. String values may use {serial} and {channel}.
params.name: Params

path.description: Relative EZVIZ API path. Use {serial} and {channel} placeholders as needed.
path.name: Path

redact_response.description: Redacts known tokens and passwords from the logged and returned result.
redact_response.name: Redact response

debug_authenticated_request.name: Debug authenticated request
